群星自定义 GUI 编辑器 — 为群星（Stellaris）Mod 制作者设计的: Stellaris Custom GUI Editor — a visual UI editing tool for Stellaris mod creators, featuring sprite rendering, real-time code preview and export.
每个副本相对前一个偏移指定像素。: Each copy is offset from the previous by the specified pixels.
以控件为圆心 — 副本分布在外环: Widget as center — copies placed on outer ring
控件在环上 — 作为起点，与副本闭合成环: Widget on ring — as start point, closes ring with copies
围绕选中控件的集合中心进行镜像。\n群星不支持旋转/翻转，仅改变位置。:
Mirror around the bounding center of selected widgets.
Stellaris does not support rotation/flip — only position is changed.
选中控件保持在原位（圆心），在环上创建: Selected widget stays at center; creates
选中控件在环上作为起点，创建: Selected widget is the start point on the ring; creates
个均匀分布在环上。: total evenly distributed on the ring.
potential: 按钮显示条件 allow: 按钮可点击条件 eff:
potential: button visibility   allow: button clickable   effect: action on click
Scopes available: This = currently selected object  From = player country
当前文件有未保存的更改，是否继续新建？: The current file has unsaved changes. Continue creating a new file?
当前文件有未保存的更改，是否切换？: The current file has unsaved changes. Continue switching?
Apply 视图 → 显示编辑器滑条 设置 to existing Scroll: Apply View → Show Editor Scrollbars setting to existing ScrollbarOverlayItem instances.
重建吸附索引，排除正在拖拽的物体。: Rebuild snap index, excluding dragged items.
查询吸附并应用修正。返回 SnapResult。: Query snap and apply correction. Returns SnapResult.
获取所有选中控件的 (position, size) 列表。: Get list of (position, size) for all selected widgets.
对选中控件执行线性阵列。: Execute linear array on selected widgets.
对选中控件执行圆形阵列。: Execute circular array on selected widgets.
对选中控件执行镜像操作。: Execute mirror operation on selected widgets.
使选中控件具有相同尺寸。mode: 'width'/'height'/'both: Make selected widgets the same size. mode: 'width'/'height'/'both'
为节点创建场景 item 并添加到场景。: Create a scene item for a node and add it to the scene.
从节点数据刷新 item 的 Qt 位置。: Refresh item Qt position from node data.
以下控件是原版必要控件，不能删除：\n: The following widgets are required vanilla widgets and cannot be deleted:
将容器/非容器相互转换可能导致子控件丢失，确认继续？: Converting between container and non-container types may cause child widgets to be lost. Confirm?
PDX 脚本语法高亮器，支持深色/浅色双主题。: PDX script syntax highlighter, supporting dark/light dual themes.
代码预览和编辑面板，支持选中控件高亮跳转。: Code preview and editing panel with selected widget highlight and jump.
当画布/属性改变时自动刷新代码视图: Auto-refresh code view when canvas or properties change
编辑代码后1.5秒自动同步到画布（实时双向同步）: Auto-sync to canvas 1.5s after code edit (live bi-directional sync)
强制重新生成代码（大文件模式下使用）: Force regenerate code (use in large file mode)
在代码中定位当前选中的控件: Locate current selected widget in code
将当前代码解析并同步回画布: Parse current code and sync back to canvas
行) — 已禁用自动应用和语法高亮以保持流畅。 代码视图仍会跟随画布更新。: lines) — auto-apply and syntax highlight disabled for performance. Code view still follows canvas updates.
主题选择变化时实时预览（不保存，取消时会还原）。: Live preview theme selection (not saved, reverts on cancel).
依赖模组目录（用于精灵图贴图查找）:: Dependency mod directories (for sprite texture lookup):
若本模组引用了其他模组的贴图/精灵图，\n请将那些模组的根目录添加到此列表。:
If this mod references textures or sprites from other mods,
add those mods' root directories to this list.
拖拽时自动对齐到其他控件的边缘/中心: Auto-align to other widgets' edges/centers while dragging
更改主题后点击\"确定\"即时生效，无需重启。: Theme changes take effect immediately when you click "OK" — no restart needed.
如：#4a9fd4 （留空使用主题默认）: e.g. #4a9fd4  (leave empty to use theme default)
代码字体修改在下次打开文件后生效。: Code font changes take effect after the next file open.
DEBUG 会记录大量信息，适合排查问题；正常使用建议 INFO。: DEBUG logs extensive information, useful for troubleshooting; INFO recommended for normal use.
若应用启动时因自动加载模组而卡死，可点此清除记录: If the app freezes on startup due to auto-loading a mod, click this to clear the record
下次启动时重新显示首次配置向导: Show the first-run configuration wizard again on next startup
上次加载的模组路径已清除。\n下次启动时将不再自动加载该模组。:
Last loaded mod path cleared.
The mod will not be auto-loaded on next startup.
下次启动时将重新显示首次配置向导。: The first-run configuration wizard will be shown again on next startup.
新文件将基于标准 Custom GUI 模板创建，包含所有必要的原版控件占位符。:
The new file will be based on the standard Custom GUI template, containing all required vanilla widget placeholders.
Do not delete or change the name values of hidden template widgets — the game will crash.
GUI 键名 (name=)，在 custom_gui= 中引用此值触发界面: GUI key name (name=), referenced in custom_gui= to trigger the interface
无法自动检测群星目录，请手动指定。\n提示：在 Steam 中右键群星 → 管理:
Cannot auto-detect Stellaris directory. Please specify manually.
Hint: In Steam, right-click Stellaris → Manage → Browse local files
实时 PDX 语法代码生成与导出: Real-time PDX script generation and export
文件浏览器，显示游戏和模组目录的 .gui/.gfx 文件。: File browser displaying .gui/.gfx files from game and mod directories.
主题切换时更新缓存颜色并清空缓存。: Update cached colors and clear cache on theme change.
返回命名图标的 QPixmap。color 为空时使用主题前景色。: Return QPixmap for named icon. Uses theme foreground color when color is empty.
返回使用主题前景色的图标。: Return icon using theme foreground color.
返回使用主题强调色的图标。: Return icon using theme accent color.
返回使用主题弱化色的图标。: Return icon using theme muted color.
主题切换后刷新所有按钮图标。: Refresh all button icons after theme change.
更新状态栏中的游戏目录状态指示器。: Update game directory status indicator in status bar.
更新状态栏中的模组加载状态指示器。: Update mod load status indicator in status bar.
取消当前正在进行的资源加载。: Cancel the current resource loading operation.
主题切换后刷新所有静态设置的图标和主题色标签。: Refresh all statically-set icons and theme color labels after theme change.
资源加载线程启动: game=%s mod=%s extra=%s: Resource loading thread started: game=%s  mod=%s  extra=%s
当前文件中所有顶层 containerWindowType（完整自定义 GUI）:
All top-level containerWindowType entries in the current file (complete custom GUIs).
Selecting one auto-filters the event panel; click "Locate" to center it on the canvas.
在画布中居中显示所选 GUI: Center the selected GUI on the canvas
重置当前文件的所有修改: Reset all modifications in the current file
关闭后隐藏画布上由编辑器生成的预览用滑条，避免遮挡或与游戏布局不一致: Hide editor-generated preview scrollbars on canvas after close, to avoid overlap with game layout
游戏目录加载状态。前往 工具→设置 配置游戏目录。: Game directory load status. Go to Tools→Settings to configure.
就绪。请打开模组目录或 .gui 文件开始编辑。: Ready. Open a mod directory or .gui file to start editing.
Loading resources in background, please wait...
Main thread: starting UI update (sprite library + file browser)...
已取消加载。资源仅部分加载，精灵图和本地化数据可能不完整。: Loading cancelled. Resources are only partially loaded — sprites and localizations may be incomplete.
主线程：模组加载后更新 UI: %s: Main thread: updating UI after mod load: %s
确定要丢弃所有未保存的修改并恢复到上次保存的状态吗？\n此操作无法撤销。:
Discard all unsaved changes and revert to last saved state?
This action cannot be undone.
资源加载线程完成，总耗时 %.2fs: Resource loading thread complete, total time %.2fs
未配置游戏目录。请前往 工具→设置 进行配置。: Game directory not configured. Please go to Tools→Settings.
取消加载：加载线程不在运行状态: Cancel load: loading thread is not running
没有已保存的状态可以重置。: No saved state to reset to.
为此文件夹指定一个名称（可选）:: Specify a name for this folder (optional):
每行格式: 精灵名称|纹理路径|类型|帧数\n类型: spriteType /:
Per-line format: SpriteName|TexturePath|Type|Frames
Type: spriteType / corneredTileSpriteType
Example: GFX_my_btn|gfx/interface/buttons/my_btn.dds|spriteType|3
有未保存的修改，是否在退出前保存？: There are unsaved changes. Save before exiting?
加载线程：game_dir 后取消，总耗时 %.2fs: Load thread: cancelled after game_dir, total %.2fs
加载线程：mod_dir 后取消，总耗时 %.2fs: Load thread: cancelled after mod_dir, total %.2fs
加载线程：extra_dirs 中取消，总耗时 %.2fs: Load thread: cancelled during extra_dirs, total %.2fs
: 缺少 name 属性 (可能导致游戏崩溃): : missing name property (may cause game crash)
属性面板，显示和编辑选中控件的属性。: Properties panel displaying and editing selected widget attributes.
[!] spriteType 控件的大小由精灵图决定,\n请用 scale 属性:
[!] spriteType widget size is determined by the sprite.
Use the scale property to adjust display size.
orientation: 锚点在父元素中的位置\norigo: 本控件的哪个点对:
orientation: anchor position within parent
origo: which point of this widget aligns to the anchor
固定尺寸精灵 (大小由图片决定): Fixed size sprite (size determined by image)
可拉伸精灵 (大小由 size 属性决定): Scalable sprite (size determined by size property)
background 是 containerWindowType 的可选子块，\:
background is an optional sub-block of containerWindowType,
using quadTextureSprite to fill the entire container.
显示并编辑所有\"未被上方表单覆盖\"的属性键值对。\n可添加自定义属性或修改不:
Display and edit all property key-value pairs not covered by the form above.
Add custom properties or modify uncommon ones — changes apply immediately.
[!] spriteType 控件的大小由精灵图决定，\n请用 scale 属性:
[!] spriteType widget size is determined by the sprite.
Use the scale property to adjust display size.
画布上的吸附参考线叠层。\n\n 作为 QGraphicsScene 的顶:
Snap guide line overlay on the canvas.

    As a top-level QGraphicsScene item, draws active snap guide lines.
    Set as non-interactive, does not affect mouse events.
设置参考线颜色（跟随主题强调色）。: Set guide line color (follows theme accent color).
更新参考线列表并刷新显示。: Update guide line list and refresh display.
精灵图库面板，列出所有已索引精灵图。: Sprite library panel listing all indexed sprites.
主题切换后刷新工具栏图标和树节点图标。: Refresh toolbar icons and tree node icons after theme change.
从画布当前选中控件创建新编组。: Create new group from currently selected canvas widgets.
将画布选中控件创建为新编组: Create new group from selected canvas widgets
将画布中选中的控件加入当前编组: Add selected canvas widgets to current group
将选中的控件从当前组中移除: Remove selected widgets from current group
确定删除此组？（控件本身不受影响）: Delete this group? (widgets themselves are not affected)
请先在画布中选中已命名控件。: Please select named widgets on the canvas first.
本编辑器帮助您为群星游戏模组设计可视化 GUI 界面，\n无需手动编写繁琐的脚本:
This editor helps you design visual GUI interfaces for Stellaris game mods,
without manually writing tedious script code.

Complete the initial setup in just 3 steps. You can always change
these options in [Tools → Settings].
• 可视化拖拽控件布局\n• 实时精灵图（DDS/PNG）渲染\n• 自动:
•  Visual drag-and-drop widget layout
•  Real-time sprite (DDS/PNG) rendering
•  Automatic .gui script code generation
•  Localization text preview
•  Undo / Redo / Autosave
编辑器需要读取群星游戏文件（精灵图、脚本等）来提供预览功能。\n请指定群星的安装:
The editor needs to read Stellaris game files (sprites, scripts, etc.) to provide preview functionality.
Please specify the Stellaris install directory, e.g.:
  Steam → right-click Stellaris → Manage → Browse local files
如果暂时没有游戏目录，可点击\"下一步\"跳过，之后在设置中补填。: If you don't have the game directory now, click "Next" to skip and fill it in Settings later.
选择您偏好的界面配色方案，可在\"工具→设置→外观\"中随时更改。: Choose your preferred color scheme. You can always change it in "Tools → Settings → Appearance".
快速上手：\n\n1. 打开模组目录\n 文件 → 打开模组目录 → 选:
Quick start:

1.  Open mod directory
    File → Open Mod Directory → Select your mod folder

2.  New or open a GUI file
    File → New GUI File (or open an existing .gui / .guicore)

3.  Drag widgets from "Widget Library", edit in "Properties"

4.  Save (Ctrl+S) to generate .gui script

If you have questions, check the help docs or file an issue on GitHub.

✗ Could not auto-detect game directory. Please browse and specify manually.

控件库面板 — 双击或点击按钮添加到画布。: Widget library panel — double-click or click button to add to canvas.
双击添加到画布中心: Double-click to add to canvas center
将当前选中的控件保存为可复用预设: Save the current selected widget as a reusable preset
更改语言后需重启应用完全生效。: Restart the application for the language change to take full effect.
在文件管理器中打开注册文件: Open GFX File in File Manager
将选中事件的上下文（文本、图像、选项）加载到画布: Load the selected event's context (text, images, options) onto the canvas
清除事件上下文，恢复空白画布: Clear event context and restore blank canvas

将选中的控件从当前组中移除: Remove Selected Widgets from Current Group
